title: Rubber Defies Lightning
description: The crew prepares to leave Skypiea with new memories, treasure, and the fulfilled promise of the golden bell.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, this scene focuses on Luffy, Enel, Nami, Aisa, Wyper. The crew prepares to leave Skypiea with new memories, treasure, and the fulfilled promise of the golden bell.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A war was in the distant past...

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Even at the very least, Vearth...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And at the very least... Right now!

summary: The crew prepares to leave Skypiea with new memories, treasure, and the fulfilled promise of the golden bell.
